title: Lifecycle Fact Source
outOfScope: Changing product runtime behavior or external deployment state
Claiming lifecycle facts prove security, compliance, or production readiness
Replacing archived Work Item evidence or manually editing generated current_status.md

sources.reason: Serial remediation plan and WI10 acceptance.
Existing lifecycle state decision logic to expose without duplication.
Generated status boundary and lifecycle rendering.

riskAssessment.reason: A read-only fact source must not diverge from existing lifecycle gates or overclaim evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution of the remediation plan, including code, docs, tests, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

preReviewWarnings: Review that JSON facts are read-only observations and that not_run remains explicit.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A read-only lifecycle fact source emits deterministic machine-readable state for bootstrap, calibration, governed development, and no-active-work-item boundaries.
The CLI and Make target expose the same fact source without duplicating lifecycle decisions or claiming readiness.
Generated status and fixture evidence document the fact-source boundary, including explicit not_run and enterpriseAssurance not_claimed semantics.
English and Japanese lifecycle documentation describe the command, JSON fields, and evidence limits.
Focused tests cover each lifecycle state and deterministic JSON output.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Lifecycle state is currently computed in multiple command paths and is primarily rendered as human-readable status, making it easy for CLI, Smoke, and multilingual documentation to drift.
constraints: The fact source is read-only and reuses existing lifecycle_state semantics.
It does not execute arbitrary project commands or infer security, compliance, production, or enterprise readiness.
Missing or not_run evidence remains explicit rather than being converted into passed facts.
Use standard-library code and preserve existing CLI behavior.
intent.rationale: One deterministic JSON fact source gives lifecycle consumers a shared vocabulary while keeping readiness and human approval as separate governed signals.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Add a deterministic read-only lifecycle fact source and align its CLI, status, smoke, and multilingual docs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: not_run and enterprise boundary remain explicit

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance files, Makefile, tests, docs, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
